title: Reversible Circuit Synthesis for a Modular-Arithmetic Permutation
strategies: basic transformation-based (MMD) synthesis, natural bit/row order (trivial)
bidirectional MMD (cheaper side per row) + peephole cancellation (greedy)
multi-direction + qubit-relabeling (conjugation) search, best verified circuit (strong)
true minimal MCT gate count -- unknown in closed form for a general permutation (open ceiling)
